purpose: Official-source registry for bounded SSIP discovery planning across startup, MSME, innovation, challenge and state pilot portals.
important_note: These entries are discovery sources only. They are not scheme records and must not be counted as catalogue schemes until discovery, classification, validation, admin review and publication accept extracted records.

discovery_batches.description: National and central-government discovery indexes for startup, MSME and scheme directories.
MeitY and MeitY Startup Hub programme discovery sources.
State pilot sources for Andhra Pradesh startup, innovation and industries support discovery.
Agriculture incubator directories and linked incubator portals used to discover startup calls, cohorts and grant windows; incubators remain discovery sources, not scheme records.
Direct agriculture-startup programme and challenge pages linked from the incubator directory audit.
MSDE, Skill India Digital and functional-arm sources for skilling, apprenticeship and entrepreneurship support discovery.
Ministry of Education, AICTE Innovation Cell and PMRC sources for higher-education innovation, entrepreneurship and research opportunities.

additional_sources.name: myScheme - Search and Discovery Index
additional_sources.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
additional_sources.department: Digital India Corporation
additional_sources.coverage_note: Search index for official government schemes and eligibility-guided discovery.

additional_sources.name: Startup India - Discovery Index

additional_sources.coverage_note: Startup India search surface for schemes, programmes, challenges and ecosystem resources.

additional_sources.department: Office of Development Commissioner (MSME)
additional_sources.coverage_note: Official DC MSME scheme directory for enterprise development and support programmes.

additional_sources.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

additional_sources.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
additional_sources.department: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

additional_sources.department: Information Technology, Electronics and Communications Department
additional_sources.coverage_note: Andhra Pradesh pilot source for startup policy, programmes and ecosystem support.

additional_sources.coverage_note: Andhra Pradesh pilot source for industry incentives and enterprise support schemes.

additional_sources.name: MANAGE - Agri-Business Incubation Centres in India
additional_sources.department: National Institute of Agricultural Extension Management (MANAGE)
additional_sources.coverage_note: Official incubator directory used to follow linked incubator portals for startup calls, cohorts and applications. Do not publish the directory entries as schemes.

additional_sources.name: ANGRAU POSHAN Incubator - Tirupati Calls
additional_sources.department: Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare
additional_sources.coverage_note: Official Tirupati incubator portal for YOCH, AGRI INVO, MERISTEMS and subsequent cohort calls; follow programme pages and linked brochures/guidelines.

additional_sources.name: PDKV Research and Incubation Foundation - Startup Calls
additional_sources.department: Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare
additional_sources.coverage_note: Official PDKV-RIF portal for agri-startup applications and dated Agri-Tech Hackathon calls; keep the incubator identity out of catalogue counts.

additional_sources.department: Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare
additional_sources.agency: Agri Food Business Incubation Centre IIT Kharagpur
additional_sources.coverage_note: Official AFBIC programme pages for SAIP, AOP and SOP identities and any future dated application calls.

additional_sources.name: ABIF IIT Kharagpur - Startup Applications
additional_sources.department: Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare
additional_sources.agency: Agri Business Incubation Foundation IIT Kharagpur
additional_sources.coverage_note: Official ABIF application surface for agriculture and allied-sector incubation/acceleration; no dated window is inferred without official evidence.

additional_sources.department: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
additional_sources.coverage_note: Official MSDE offerings index for permanent schemes and services; dated application windows require separate evidence.

additional_sources.department: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
additional_sources.coverage_note: Official MSDE notices, public comments and programme updates used to identify dated calls and historical windows.

additional_sources.department: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
